Aldric Voss.description: Aldric teaches you a grappling technique he learned from the Solamnic wrestling pits. The hold is simple but devastating.
Aldric Voss.dialogue: Here. Lock the elbow like this. My brother showed me before he — well. Before. It works. Trust me.

Thessaly Brightwater.description: Thessaly shares her method for cross-referencing sources and spotting contradictions in historical records.
Thessaly Brightwater.dialogue: Three sources minimum. If two agree and one contradicts, the contradiction is usually the truth. People lie in the same direction. Truth is the outlier.

Commander Serath.description: Serath teaches you to read micro-expressions and verbal patterns — the interrogation techniques of a Dragon Army officer.
Commander Serath.dialogue: Watch the hands, not the face. The face lies first. The hands forget to. And when someone touches their neck while speaking — they are deciding how much to tell you.

Mira of the Oaks.description: Mira shows you which herbs to use for wound care and how to set a bone in the field without tools.
Mira of the Oaks.dialogue: Yarrow stops bleeding. Willow bark dulls pain. Comfrey knits bone. That is everything you need to know to save someone's life on the road. Everything else is refinement.

Lord Caeron Ashvale.description: Caeron teaches you the art of noble rhetoric — when to pause, when to lower your voice, when to let silence do the work.
Lord Caeron Ashvale.dialogue: Never raise your voice. The moment you shout, you have lost the room. Speak quieter. Make them lean in. The one who controls the silence controls the conversation.

Sera Nighthollow.description: Sera shows you how to read animal tracks, find water from vegetation patterns, and build a shelter from forest debris.
Sera Nighthollow.dialogue: Moss grows on the wet side, not the north side. Birds fly toward water at dawn. And if you can hear a stream, you are already too close to the bank — floods come fast.

Vael Ashmore.description: Vael teaches you the command presence they have been perfecting — how to fill a doorway and make people think twice.
Vael Ashmore.dialogue: Stand still. Do not fidget. Look at the bridge of their nose, not their eyes — it unsettles them without them knowing why. And never threaten. Threats are for people who are not sure they will follow through.

Tariel Duskmantle.description: Tariel shares their method for identifying magical residue and recognising pre-Cataclysm enchantments by their harmonic patterns.
Tariel Duskmantle.dialogue: Magic leaves a resonance. Like a bell that was struck and stopped — the sound is gone but the vibration remains in the metal. Learn to feel it in old stone. It will tell you what was here before.

Lysander Graves.description: Lysander teaches you to move without sound — how to place your feet, how to breathe, how to become part of the darkness.
Lysander Graves.dialogue: Heel first, then roll to the toe. Match your breathing to the wind. And never look directly at someone you are hiding from — they feel it. I do not know why. They just do.
